evidence: Validated against builds/protobuf-asan-arm64/lib/libprotobuf.a with a fresh PoC. Running poc_real produced: cord_size=16, byte_count_before=0, skip_return=0, byte_count_after=16, next_after_skip=0, next_size=-1. No AddressSanitizer memory corruption was reported during the successful run; instead, CordInputStream::Skip(-1) consumed the remaining Cord and moved the stream to EOF while returning false.
